violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee doing food prep was changing tasks and changing gloves without washing hands.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Fan in the kitchen is dirty.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tile missing above the pizza oven exposing the attic.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
